kart-coordinatedirectionfield.description: CoordinateDirectionField — select a geographic coordinate and a facing direction (0–360°) via an interactive map or manual input fields. Internally delegates to GeoJsonEditor in single-feature directional-point mode.

reactDocgen.description:
CoordinateDirectionField — select a geographic coordinate and a facing
direction (0–360°) via an interactive map or manual input fields.

Internally delegates to GeoJsonEditor in single-feature directional-point mode.

className.description: Additional CSS class applied to the root element.

height.description: Height of the map container. Defaults to `"400px"`.

showCenterAction.description:
Show a crosshair at the map center with a button to trigger a click there.
- `true` — always visible
- `false` — always hidden
- `undefined` — auto-detect (visible on touch devices)

error.description: Error message displayed below the inputs.

onChange.description: Called when the user changes the coordinate or direction.

or manual input fields.

Show a crosshair at the map center with a button to trigger a click there.
- `true` — always visible

kart-geojsoneditor.name: GeoJsonEditor

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet: const Default = () => <GeoJsonEditor />;
stories.description: The default state: an empty map with all drawing tools available. Use the toolbar to draw points, lines, and polygons.

stories.name: With Initial Data
stories.snippet: const WithInitialData = () => <GeoJsonEditor value={norwegianCoastData} fitBounds showCenterAction />;
stories.description: The editor pre-loaded with a FeatureCollection containing a polygon (Ålesund Havn), a point (Kråkenes Fyr) and a linestring (Hovedled Sør–Nord). `fitBounds` zooms the map to fit all features on mount.

stories.name: Controlled
Points Only
stories.snippet: const PointsOnly = () => <GeoJsonEditor modes={["point"]} />;
stories.description: Only the point tool is available in the toolbar.

stories.name: Lines Only
stories.snippet: const LinesOnly = () => <GeoJsonEditor modes={["linestring"]} />;
stories.description: Only the linestring tool is available in the toolbar.

stories.name: Polygons Only
stories.snippet: const PolygonsOnly = () => <GeoJsonEditor modes={["polygon"]} />;
stories.description: Only the polygon tool is available in the toolbar.

stories.name: Directional Points Only
stories.snippet: const DirectionalPointsOnly = () => <GeoJsonEditor modes={["directional-point"]} />;
stories.description: Only directional-point mode. Each placed point stores a `direction` angle (0–360°) that can be used to represent headings, bearings, etc.

stories.name: Directional Controlled
Read Only
stories.snippet: const ReadOnly = () => <GeoJsonEditor value={norwegianCoastData} fitBounds disabled />;
stories.description: `disabled` removes the toolbar and all interaction. Use this to display GeoJSON data without allowing any edits.

stories.name: With Hover Content
With Layer Toggle
stories.snippet:
const WithLayerToggle = () => (
  <ViewBoundsProvider>
    <BaseLayersProvider>
      <BuiltInLayersProvider>
        <CustomLayersProvider>
          <GeoJsonEditor
            value={norwegianCoastData}
            fitBounds
            showCenterAction
          />
        </CustomLayersProvider>
      </BuiltInLayersProvider>
    </BaseLayersProvider>
  </ViewBoundsProvider>
);
stories.description: Shows the built-in layer toggle control. Requires the full layer context stack (`ViewBoundsProvider`, `BaseLayersProvider`, etc.).

stories.name: Single Feature Point
Single Feature Directional Point
Single Feature Polygon
stories.snippet: const SingleFeaturePolygon = () => <GeoJsonEditor singleFeature modes={["polygon"]} />;
stories.description: `singleFeature` with `polygon` mode — only one polygon at a time.

kart-geojsoneditor.description: GeoJsonEditor — draw and edit GeoJSON points, lines, and polygons on an interactive Kartverket map. Uses terra-draw for interactive drawing and editing. Emits the full FeatureCollection via `onChange` on every change. Supports feature hover (with customizable content per type) and selection callbacks when using terra-draw's select mode.

reactDocgen.description:
GeoJsonEditor — draw and edit GeoJSON points, lines, and polygons
on an interactive Kartverket map.

Uses terra-draw for interactive drawing and editing. Emits the full
FeatureCollection via `onChange` on every change.

Supports feature hover (with customizable content per type) and selection
callbacks when using terra-draw's select mode.

className.description: Additional CSS class applied to the root element.

height.description: Height of the map container. Defaults to `"400px"`.

showCenterAction.description:
Show a crosshair at the map center with a button to trigger a click there.
- `true` — always visible
- `false` — always hidden
- `undefined` — auto-detect (visible on touch devices)

value.description: Current GeoJSON value (controlled). Accepts a Feature or FeatureCollection.

onChange.description: Called whenever features are created, edited, or deleted.

modes.description:
Which drawing modes to show in the toolbar.
Defaults to all three: `["point", "linestring", "polygon"]`.

editable.description: Whether existing features can be selected and edited. Defaults to `true`.

deletable.description: Whether selected features can be deleted. Defaults to `true`.

fitBounds.description:
Whether the map should auto-fit to the data bounds when `value` is first provided.
Defaults to `true`.

fitBoundsPadding.description: Padding (in pixels) applied when fitting bounds. Defaults to `40`.

showLayerToggle.description: Whether to show the layer toggle control on the map. Defaults to `false`.

hoverable.description: Whether features can be hovered to show tooltips. Defaults to `true`.

tsType.name: signature
tsType.raw:
(
  feature: InteractiveFeature | null,
  event: maplibregl.MapMouseEvent | null,
) => void

onHover.description:
Called when the hovered feature changes.
Receives the feature and the original mouse event, or null when hover ends.

onSelect.description:
Called when the selection changes (via click or terra-draw selection).
Receives array of selected features, or null when selection is cleared.

hoverContent.description:
Custom render functions for hover content based on the feature's `type` property.
Keys are the `properties.type` values; the function receives the hovered feature
and returns the content to display in the hover popup.

If a feature's type is not in this map, the default content (type name) is shown.

onCoordinateClick.description:
Called when the user clicks on the map (while not actively drawing).
The result includes the clicked coordinate and WMS GetFeatureInfo
results for all visible WMS catalog layers.

onImportError.description:
Called when a GeoJSON file import fails.
Receives a machine-readable reason and a human-readable detail message.

singleFeature.description:
When `true`, only one feature can exist at a time. The feature type is
determined by `modes[0]` (which should contain exactly one mode).

- The toolbar is hidden and drawing mode is auto-activated.
- Placing a new feature automatically replaces the existing one.

This allows GeoJsonEditor to be used as a drop-in replacement for
`CoordinateField` (with `modes: ['point']`) or
`CoordinateDirectionField` (with `modes: ['directional-point']`).

tsType.name: signature

kart-geojsonviewer.description: GeoJsonViewer — display GeoJSON data on an interactive Kartverket map. Renders Point, LineString, Polygon (and their Multi-variants) using MapLibre GL layers. The map auto-fits to the data bounds by default. Supports feature hover (with customizable content per type) and selection (single or multi-select with Ctrl/Cmd).

reactDocgen.description:
GeoJsonViewer — display GeoJSON data on an interactive Kartverket map.

Renders Point, LineString, Polygon (and their Multi-variants) using
MapLibre GL layers. The map auto-fits to the data bounds by default.

Supports feature hover (with customizable content per type) and selection
(single or multi-select with Ctrl/Cmd).

className.description: Additional CSS class applied to the root element.

height.description: Height of the map container. Defaults to `"400px"`.

showCenterAction.description:
Show a crosshair at the map center with a button to trigger a click there.
- `true` — always visible
- `false` — always hidden
- `undefined` — auto-detect (visible on touch devices)

data.description:
GeoJSON data to display on the map. Accepts a Feature or FeatureCollection.

Individual features can include {@link FeatureStyleProperties} in their
`properties` object to override the global `geoJsonStyle` defaults on a
per-feature basis (e.g. different fill colors per polygon).

fitBounds.description:
Whether to automatically fit the map view to the bounding box of the GeoJSON data.
Defaults to `true`.

fitBoundsPadding.description: Padding (in pixels) applied when fitting bounds. Defaults to `40`.

geoJsonStyle.description: Styling overrides for the rendered GeoJSON layers.

showLayerToggle.description: Whether to show the layer toggle control on the map. Defaults to `false`.

hoverable.description: Whether features can be hovered to show tooltips. Defaults to `true`.

selectable.description: Whether features can be clicked to select them. Defaults to `true`.

tsType.name: signature
tsType.raw:
(
  feature: InteractiveFeature | null,
  event: maplibregl.MapMouseEvent | null,
) => void

onHover.description:
Called when the hovered feature changes.
Receives the feature and the original mouse event, or null when hover ends.

onSelect.description:
Called when the selection changes.
Receives array of selected features, or null when selection is cleared.

hoverContent.description:
Custom render functions for hover content based on the feature's `type` property.
Keys are the `properties.type` values; the function receives the hovered feature
and returns the content to display in the hover popup.

If a feature's type is not in this map, the default content (type name) is shown.

onCoordinateClick.description:
Called when the user clicks on the map. The result includes the clicked
coordinate and WMS GetFeatureInfo results for all visible WMS catalog layers.

tsType.name: signature

getLabel.description:
Function that computes a label for each feature. Return `null` or
`undefined` to skip labelling a feature. Defaults to showing
`#<nummer>` when a `nummer` property exists.

kart-layertoggle.name: LayerToggle

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet: const Default = () => ( );
stories.description: Default — collapsed, with built-in layers available.

stories.name: Start Open
stories.snippet:
const StartOpen = () => (
  <ViewBoundsProvider>
    <BaseLayersProvider>
      <BuiltInLayersProvider>
        <CustomLayersProvider>
          <MapWithLayerToggle defaultOpen />
        </CustomLayersProvider>
      </BuiltInLayersProvider>
    </BaseLayersProvider>
  </ViewBoundsProvider>
);
stories.description: Starts open so layers are immediately visible.

stories.name: Filtered Layers
stories.snippet:
const FilteredLayers = () => (
  <ViewBoundsProvider>
    <BaseLayersProvider>
      <BuiltInLayersProvider include={["Havnedata", "Bilder"]}>
        <CustomLayersProvider>
          <MapWithLayerToggle defaultOpen />
        </CustomLayersProvider>
      </BuiltInLayersProvider>
    </BaseLayersProvider>
  </ViewBoundsProvider>
);
stories.description: Only a subset of built-in layers (using include filter).

stories.name: Multiple Base Layers
stories.snippet:
const MultipleBaseLayers = () => (
  <ViewBoundsProvider>
    <BaseLayersProvider
      baseLayers={[
        KARTVERKET_TOPO_BASE_LAYER,
        KARTVERKET_SEA_BASE_LAYER,
        KARTVERKET_GRAATONE_BASE_LAYER,
      ]}
    >
      <BuiltInLayersProvider>
        <CustomLayersProvider>
          <MapWithLayerToggle defaultOpen />
        </CustomLayersProvider>
      </BuiltInLayersProvider>
    </BaseLayersProvider>
  </ViewBoundsProvider>
);
stories.description: Multiple base layers — demonstrates the radio-button base layer switcher.

kart-layertoggle.description: LayerToggle — a map overlay control that lets users turn map layers on and off. Place this component **inside** the map container element (the same `<div>` whose ref is `mapContainerRef`) so it is positioned over the map. It reads all available layers from `useMapLayers` and groups them by category.

reactDocgen.description:
LayerToggle — a map overlay control that lets users turn map layers on and off. Place this component **inside** the map container element (the same `
` whose ref is `mapContainerRef`) so it is positioned over the map. It reads all available layers from `useMapLayers` and groups them by category. @example ```tsx
```

className.description: Additional CSS class applied to the root element.

defaultOpen.description: Whether the panel starts open. Defaults to `false`.

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <MapField
    label="Stedsangivelse"
    description="Marker stedene på kartet"
    height="500px" />;

stories.name: With Annotations
With Error
stories.snippet:
const WithError = () => <MapField
    label="Stedsangivelse"
    description="Marker stedene på kartet"
    height="500px"
    error="Det oppsto en feil ved innlastning av kartdata" />;

stories.name: Required
stories.snippet:
const Required = () => <MapField
    label="Stedsangivelse"
    description="Marker stedene på kartet"
    required
    height="500px" />;

stories.name: Read Only
stories.snippet:
const ReadOnly = () => <MapField
    label="Stedsangivelse"
    description="Disse markeringene kan ikke redigeres"
    disabled
    value={sampleData}
    fitBounds
    height="500px" />;

onChange.description: Called whenever features are created, edited, or deleted.

required.description: Mark the field as required. Pass a string to customise the tag text.

optional.description: Mark the field as optional. Pass a string to customise the tag text.

annotations.description:
Annotation definitions passed to GeoJsonAnnotater.
When provided, annotation inputs are rendered below the map for each feature.
